translations.en: an industrious young woman.
"Well, hello again, Avatar!"
"How can I help thee this fine $T?"
translations.zh: 「這個美好的$T，吾能為汝做什麼？」

translations.en: "I'm Michelle."
"Thou needn't tell me thy name, $P. The Avatar is famous throughout the land!"
translations.zh: 「汝無需告訴吾汝的名字，$P。聖者大名聞名天下！」

translations.en: "I weave baskets and beehives, just like my @father and his father before him."
translations.zh: 「吾編織籃子和蜂箱，就像吾的@父親和他父親一樣。」

translations.en: "My @baskets are sold throughout Britannia!" she adds proudly.
translations.zh: 「吾的@籃子行銷整個不列顛尼亞！」她自豪地補充道。

translations.en: "Come to my shop when I'm open!"
"Come to my shop when I'm open!"
"I have all I need, and have no reason to purchase anything more."
translations.zh: 「吾所需的一切都已齊備，沒有理由再購買什麼了。」

translations.en: "But I appreciate thy offer."
"Father once told me a story of weaving a basket large enough for eight people!"
translations.zh: 「父親曾告訴吾一個故事，說他曾編織過一個能容納八個人的大籃子！」

translations.en: "He never showed me the @plans, though."
"Ask when I'm open for business!"
"Yes, without accurate plans it takes far too much time to craft a basket."
translations.zh: 「是的，沒有精確的設計圖，製作一個籃子會耗費太多時間。」

translations.en: "Then it was true! Father did weave a basket that big!"
translations.zh: 「那是真的！父親確實編過那麼大的籃子！」

translations.en: "Surely I could do the same."
She studies the plans for a moment.
translations.zh: 她仔細端詳設計圖片刻。

translations.en: "Farewell! I hope I've aided thy quest!"
translations.zh: 「珍重！吾希望吾幫到汝的任務了！」

translations.en: "Beg pardon?"
"Wouldst thou like to buy one of my weavings?"
translations.zh: 「汝想購買吾的一件編織品嗎？」

translations.en: "All right, though I can give thou the best price in the land!"
translations.zh: 「好吧，雖然吾已提供全境最優惠的價格了！」

translations.en: "Which of you?"
1) Basket
2) Beehive
3) Custom job
"Which item?"
"I fear my schedule is packed."
"I have no time to create a basket for which I have no @plans."
translations.zh: 「吾沒有時間製作一個沒有@設計圖的籃子。」

translations.en: "Those $1s cost #1 gold apiece."
"How many dost thou wish?"
"Thou canst not carry that many!"
"I will sell thee just #5 $1\s."
"But thou canst not carry any $1s!"
"Thou hast not enough gold for that many!"
translations.zh: 「汝的金幣不足以購買那麼多！」

translations.en: "I will sell thee just #5 $1\s."
"But thou canst not afford any $1s!"
Michelle takes $Y's money and hands over the $1
translations.zh: 米雪兒收下 $Y 的金幣，遞出 $1

translations.en: . "I appreciate thy business."
"Is there aught else thou wouldst buy?"
"Perhaps some other time."
"Enjoy thy $1
"But it would weigh six stones!"
"Thou couldst not carry such a basket, loaded as thou art."
translations.zh: 「汝現在已負重累累，根本拿不動那樣的籃子。」

translations.en: "Lighten thy load, and then I will weave thee this basket."
translations.zh: 「先減輕行李，吾再為汝編織這個籃子。」

translations.en: "Such a basket would cost 300 gold, in advance. Art thou still interested?"
translations.zh: 「這樣的籃子需 300 枚金幣，須先付清。汝還有意購買嗎？」

translations.en: "I do not blame thee. 'Tis a huge undertaking!"
translations.zh: 「吾不怪汝。這確實是個大工程！」

translations.en: "Thou hast not enough money for the basket."
translations.zh: 「汝的金幣不夠購買這個籃子。」

translations.en: "I fear I cannot afford to start such a task on a mere #2 gold crown\s."
translations.zh: 「吾恐怕無法僅憑 #2 枚金幣就開始這樣的工程。」

translations.en: Your party takes up a collection to pay for the basket.
translations.zh: 汝的隊伍湊錢支付籃子的費用。

translations.en: She begins weaving the huge basket, chatting with you as she works.
translations.zh: 她開始編織這個巨大的籃子，一邊工作一邊與汝閒聊。

translations.en: "Hast thou found a silk weaver yet?"
"Thou art wise, then. 'Tis a huge bag this will require."
translations.zh: 「那汝真有遠見。這需要一個巨大的絲袋。」

translations.en: "Well, I can see that this will require a huge silk bag."
translations.zh: 「嗯，吾看得出這需要一個巨大的絲袋。」

translations.en: "I know not where thou might find a silk weaver to craft it!"
translations.zh: 「吾不知道汝去哪裡找絲綢工匠來製作！」

translations.en: She continues weaving the basket.
"I do not mean to pry, but why dost thou need a balloon anyway?"
translations.zh: 「吾無意窺探，但汝究竟為何需要氣球？」

translations.en: "I'm afraid I don't understand."
"Oh, I see."
She continues weaving the basket.
Time passes...
More time passes...
"Finished!"
"It took less time than I had thought it might!"
She gives the basket to $Y, who struggles under its weight.
translations.zh: 她將籃子交給 $Y，$Y 在其重量下吃力不堪。

translations.en: "These baskets are sturdy and decorative."*
"Thou'lt find no better in all Britannia for the price, a mere #1 gold."
translations.zh: 「以這個價格，整個不列顛尼亞找不到更好的，僅需 #1 枚金幣。」

translations.en: "If thou hast need of beehives, these woven ones are the best thou'lt find!"*
translations.zh: 「若汝需要蜂箱，這些編織的是汝能找到的最好的！」*

translations.en: "And cheap, too, at #1 apiece."
translations.zh: 「而且價格低廉，每個僅 #1 枚金幣。」

translator_notes: 米雪兒是密諾克的年輕籃子工匠，家傳手藝。氣球任務的關鍵人物：她父親曾編過能容納八人的大籃子，需要設計圖才能製作。特製氣球籃子需 300 金且需有設計圖，完成後還需另找絲綢工匠製作氣囊。
